text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
All right, my cleats are good! I've changed out the
laces for new ones, and they're looking nice and
fresh after I cleaned off the mud!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. You've been tending to your shoes so
diligently these days, Kita.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I wanna be in top form for tomorrow's
training session!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna surprise my trainer with how much I've
grown and how much better my stamina is, even
compared to last week!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
If I do that, I'm sure Trainer will notice! And then
I'll get heaps and heaps of praise!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I just know I'm going to be drowning in
compliments tomorrow! Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Interesting. So you treat your training sessions as
chances to demonstrate your daily improvements
to your trainer, correct?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Here's to another great day together!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Now watch and be amazed by how much faster
I've gotten thanks to your help!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black finishes her cheerful declaration
and runs even better than she did the day before.
